description_long: This is a disposable coffee cup with a white plastic lid and a blue corrugated paper sleeve wrapped around its midsection. The cup itself is primarily white, with some subtle grayish shading and a slightly marbled texture. The blue sleeve features hand-drawn artwork, including a stylized face and Japanese text, giving it a personalized or artistic touch. The lid is a typical snap-on type with a small drinking spout visible in some views. The cup appears lightweight and is designed for single-use, commonly found in urban environments such as coffee shops or carried by pedestrians. The overall appearance suggests it is intended for hot beverages like coffee or tea.
description: A white disposable coffee cup with a blue corrugated sleeve, white plastic lid, and hand-drawn artwork and text on the sleeve.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's white lid, blue sleeve with a prominent hand-drawn face, and part of the Japanese text.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the Japanese text on the blue sleeve, with less emphasis on the face artwork.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain blue corrugated sleeve without any visible artwork or text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue sleeve's texture and subtle color variation, with no visible artwork or text.
